title: AIIMS Delhi Project Nurse, DEO and More Posts Recruitment 2026, Apply Online -
organization: AIIMS Delhi Project Nurse, DEO and More Posts

vacancy_details.eligibility: Minimum Second Class or equivalent CGPA for a four-year Nursing Course (B.Sc Nursing). Desirable: at least 2 years’ experience in Basic sciences or health sciences.
Graduation in any discipline with 5 years’ work experience in administration, finance, and accounts work. Desirable: Experience in web handling & social media for public awareness & Education.

how_to_apply: Visit the official website Find and click the “Recruitment Link” or “Apply Online” link on the homepage. First, register – enter your name, email, mobile number, and password. After registering, log in and focus on the application form—specifically, the personal details, qualifications, and selection of the position.
